title: Snickerdoodles and Snickerdoodle Sandwich Cookies
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream together 1 ½ cups sugar and butter.
Beat in eggs and vanilla until light and fluffy.
In a second bowl, whisk together flour, salt, baking soda, and cream of tartar.
Add dry ingredients to butter mixture and mix until combined.
In a pie plate, mix 4 tbsp sugar and 4 tsp cinnamon.
Shape dough into 1" balls and roll in cinnamon sugar mixture.
Place 2 inches apart on parchment-lined baking sheets.
Bake at 375 degrees F for 8-9 minutes.
For the frosting, place softened butter in a large mixing bowl and cream until smooth.
Add powdered sugar and heavy cream in batches, whipping until smooth.
Add vanilla and cinnamon to frosting and adjust seasonings if desired.
For sandwich cookies, bake and cool the snickerdoodle cookies.
Spread frosting on the bottom of one snickerdoodle cookie and top with another cookie.
notes: The author made hundreds of these snickerdoodle sandwich cookies for Joy and Nick's wedding reception.
